chunks.text: 1 ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Constitution Petition No. D-281 of 2024 (Zulfiquar Ali Narejo Vs. P.O Sindh & others) DATE OF HEARING ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For Orders on CMA No. 1195/2024 (U/A) 2. For Orders on office objection. 3. For Orders on CMA No. 1196/2024 (Ex./A) 4. For hearing of main case. 21-03-2024. Mr. Mir Ali Nawaz Khan advocate for the petitioner. ******** 1. Granted. 2. Over ruled. 3. Granted subject to all just legal exceptions. 4. The facts in brief necessary for disposal of instant petition are that the petitioner by making an application u/s 22 A/B Cr.P.C sought for direction against the police to record his 161 Cr.P.C statement and to constitute a Joint Investigation Team, it was allowed by learned IIIrd Additional Sessions Judge/Ex-Officio Justice of Peace, Khairpur vide order dated 23-02-2024, such order now is being sought to be implemented by the petitioner through this Court by way of instant petition. The writ jurisdiction of this Court could hardly be made available to execute an order passed by Ex-Officio Justice of Peace; consequently instant petition being misconceived is dismissed in limine directing the petitioner to approach the Ex-Officio Justice of Peace concerned for the purpose, if so is advised to him. Judge Judge Nasim/P.A
